case_title: DONALD THOMAS BERGERSEN VS. NASIR PATEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DONALD THOMAS BERGERSEN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NASIR PATEL, DBA MARATHON HOTEL, LLC. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 11/7/16. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,230.00 FILED BY BERGERSEN, DONALD THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, NASIR DBA MARATHON HOTEL ETC. LLC DOES 1-10 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERGERSEN, DONALD THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, NASIR DBA MARATHON HOTEL ETC. LLC DOES 1-10 $2,230.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,280.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH LACK OF COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(E). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERGERSEN, DONALD THOMAS
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BERGERSEN, DONALD THOMAS
